title: Body Parsing, Raw Webhooks, Forms, Multipart Uploads, and Byte Limits · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs body parsing, raw webhooks, forms, multipart uploads, and byte limits from bounded code and request evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the bounded body ownership and parser matrix. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for bounded body ownership and parser matrix after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Configure express.json type, limit, inflate, strict, reviver, and verify behavior while treating req.body as undefined until parsing succeeds.
Enforce declared, compressed, decoded, field-count, nesting, and semantic-size budgets before expensive parsing or effects.
Preserve exact raw bytes for signature verification while separating timestamp, replay, media type, decode, validation, and enqueue decisions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
